case_title: KOKAS, JOANNE vs. FONG, SHUK et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOKAS, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, SHUK RODRIGUEZ, MORENA DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-27-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-29-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-09-2001
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2001 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON JUN-26-2001, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROSS LINDA., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-11-2001 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ORDER OF SANCTIONS FOR FTA; CCP 473(B), PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOKAS, JOANNE HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-2001 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ROSS LINDA. HEARING SET FOR SEP-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 212, MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ORDER OF SANCTIONS FOR FTA; CCP 473(B), CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2001, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 6-27-01 ARE VACATED.
ORDER BY COMM. FLAGEOLETT--SETTING ASIDE SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 27/JUN/01, FILED BY PLAINTIFF
